response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as a Yuzuki Choco birthday concert performance. 2. Identified 'Chocolate Box' (00:00-03:12) via on-screen text. 3. Searched for original composer of 'Chocolate Box' (dezzy/ichiP) and found full lyrics on Utaten. 4. Identified the transition (03:12-03:15). 5. Identified 'Kokuhaku Nichibyou, Desu!' (03:15-05:01) via on-screen text ('作曲: 若林充'). 6. Searched for lyrics of 'Kokuhaku Nichibyou, Desu!' and found full lyrics on Sogou.
response.global_summary: This video features a live concert performance by VTubers Yuzuki Choco and a guest, celebrating Choco's birthday in 2026. They perform two songs, 'Chocolate Box' and 'Kokuhaku Nichibyou, Desu!'.

scenes.description: Yuzuki Choco and a guest perform the song 'Chocolate Box'. Visuals show them dancing on a stage themed as a chocolate shop. Text in top left corner confirms the song title.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Something, something, you always seem sleepy
Something, something, you always seem bored
Something, something, you always seem dangerous
Something, something, you're always playing with your smartphone
Even though you're actually high-energy
When you're with me, it's super low
What, what, yourself? Isn't it unbelievable?
I hate it, I hate it so much. Whatever!!
Then I'll say it too, you know!
You get angry immediately over small things
You cry immediately if I talk back
You won't forgive me even if I say sorry
And yet, once the night breaks
You say 'Good morning' as if nothing happened
Ah, what a sinful person you are
Damn it!! I don't care anymore!!
Sweet, sweet, love's magic box
Universe-flavored secret chocolate
Shall we scatter and decorate it, just for the two of us, and eat it up!
Bitter, bitter, love's treasure box
Future-flavored mysterious chocolate
Once warmed and mixed, it will surely
Someday become a taste that suits our mouths
L: 'Hey, hey, can I ask you something?'
R: 'Why?'
L: 'About earlier, you know, sorry...'
R: 'What about it?'
L: 'We always get annoyed, don't we?'
R: 'So?'
L: 'Today, I wanted to give you this...
Because words aren't enough, you see'
R: 'That's why!!'
L: 'Won't you accept it?'
R: 'What is it!!'
L: 'Thank you for being with me (flower)'
R: 'Whaaaaaaa...'
L: '(What is that...)'
I end up indulging in your kindness
Because we are closer than anyone else, I can't be honest
I end up forgetting your earnestness
Even though I love you more than anyone
Sweet, sweet, dream's treasure box
Miracle-flavored secret chocolate
Shall we search and build our own innovation, just for the two of us, and make it lively!
Bitter, bitter, daily vanity box
World-flavored first chocolate
Don't let it cool down and break
Carefully wrap it until the completion of our lifetime
R: Anytime L: Even when sick
R: Any day L: Yes, forever
R: Even when healthy L: Take my hand
Until death parts us two
R: I love you L: Me too
R: Stay by my side L: I'm by your side
R: Is that a lie, perhaps?
L: Ah, is that so? I said it randomly too
R: Sweet, sweet?
L: Bitter, bitter?
Sweet, sweet, love's magic box
Universe-flavored secret chocolate
Shall we scatter and decorate it, just for the two of us, and eat it up!
Bitter, bitter, love's treasure box
Future-flavored mysterious chocolate
Once warmed and mixed, absolutely
Someday it will become the happiest taste ever
One, two, three!
Thank you so much!
See you next time ;)",reference_lyrics_og:

scenes.description: Brief interlude/transition between the two songs with a clock countdown. No vocal music playing.
Yuzuki Choco and a guest perform 'Kokuhaku Nichibyou, Desu!'. Visuals show them in a hospital-themed set, transitioning to a stage. Text confirms composer Wakabayashi Mitsuru.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, can I ask you just one thing?
About me...
Maybe we can meet today, my heart is racing
I felt like skipping
The moment I dance with excitement
You probably aren't even thinking about me
But... I'm right here
I'm right here, my confidence is swaying
I wonder if you hate me?
With momentum, I'll just say hello anyway!
It's finally cleared up, it's cleared up suddenly
And I feel energetic
I'll pat your back instead of saying 'Good morning'
'Alright, let's go!'
It's finally cleared up, it's cleared up suddenly
Surely, an energetic smile
Somehow, these feelings I have right now have become painful!
My mind is on something else even during class, looking far away
Isn't love sweet?
Maybe it's different, half of it is painful
More than just dreaming, I have to touch and confirm it
So... let's get moving
Being yourself, living joyfully, Kotori
Every day is a miracle
Instead of regretting it without saying it, let's have courage!
From long ago, from way long ago
I've been waiting to ask you
I'll be the first to tell you
'I love you!'
It's been a long time, from way long ago
Will you answer what I asked?
How do you feel? Show me everything!
Living joyfully, every day is a miracle
Even if I'm actually anxious, let's have courage!
(Let's have courage? Yeah!)
From long ago, from way long ago
I've been waiting to ask you
I'll be the first to tell you
'I love you!'
It's been a long time, from way long ago
Will you answer what I asked?
How do you feel? Show me everything!",reference_lyrics_og:
